scenarios.title: Ready identifies one stable model across Simple and Power

gherkin.given: cached Bond Regime bars are painted and automatic external Treasury hydration is unresolved
gherkin.when: the page reports its readiness state and the user switches from Simple to Power after Ready
gherkin.then: Ready is absent until automatic hydration settles and both modes expose one digest with unchanged assumptions and no mode-switch request

linkedTests.testId: BS-011 Simple and Power share one model digest
linkedTests.requiredAssertion: The exact protected Feature 003 title and behavior assertions remain unchanged and pass.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-003: Ready waits for auto-hydration before Simple and Power comparison
plannedRegressions.command: npx --no-install playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Regression BUG-003: Ready waits for auto-hydration before Simple and Power comparison" --reporter=list
plannedRegressions.discriminator: The true external Treasury response remains unresolved while current production incorrectly exposes Ready.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: BS-011 Simple and Power share one model digest
plannedRegressions.command: npx --no-install playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-011 Simple and Power share one model digest" --reporter=list
